overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character walking through Night City at dusk. The scene features futuristic urban architecture with massive concrete overpasses, neon billboards, and a mix of police presence and civilian pedestrians. The camera follows a character in an orange jacket through the streets, passing under elevated highways and approaching a building entrance with a pawn shop.

crossing the street at the intersection under the overpass
turning slightly to follow the sidewalk path under the elevated structure

character in orange jacket walking ahead on the sidewalk

vertical traffic signal showing red light

segments.scene_description: The scene opens under a massive concrete overpass where police officers stand near a patrol car. The camera moves forward, crossing a street intersection with a Valley street sign visible, following a character in an orange jacket who walks ahead on the sidewalk.

segments.scene_description: Walking along a sidewalk beneath a massive elevated highway, the camera follows the character in orange through an industrial corridor. Digital billboards illuminate the left side while traffic flows on the right, and the concrete architecture creates a canyon-like atmosphere.

segments.scene_description: As the character in orange sits on a bench, the camera continues past them toward a building entrance. Large digital billboards including one for Sweet Sweet Speed 2 dominate the left side, while Lucky Patriots graffiti marks the wall near the stairs leading up to the entrance.

segments.scene_description: The camera enters a plaza area scattered with debris, approaching a building entrance with concrete stairs. A yellow pawn shop kiosk with a green illuminated sign sits on the right, while blue neon lights frame the entrance ahead.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a concrete urban canyon that transitions from a police-monitored intersection into a neon-lit plaza. It begins under a massive concrete overpass where police officers stand by a patrol car, moving forward across a street intersection and following a character in an orange jacket. As the camera tracks the character along a sidewalk beneath an elevated highway, the environment shifts into an industrial corridor defined by flowing traffic and glowing digital billboards. The scene then opens up as the character pauses on a bench, allowing the camera to glide past toward a building entrance marked by Lucky Patriots graffiti and a large advertisement for Sweet Sweet Speed 2. Finally, the movement leads into a debris-scattered plaza, passing a yellow pawn shop kiosk with a green illuminated sign before approaching a doorway framed in blue neon lights.
